comment: Versioned Purchaser identity (decision D5) — printed on every PO's brand header, invoice-routing line, and Purchaser signature block, and substituted into terms tokens ({{purchaser_entity}}). NEVER hard-code these values in render code. Entity + STE 570 address are pending Evergreen written confirmation (Day-1 external request item 8; pre-cutover checklist line) — bump config_version on any change.
